title: 2026-06-27 Buenos Aires Malbec Winter Culture
summary: Buenos Aires winter culture set using malbec plum across San Telmo market shopping, El Ateneo-style bookstore browsing, San Telmo bar conversation, and Teatro General San Martín theater-going.
summaryJa: ブエノスアイレスのアルバム。色の軸はマルベックプラム。構成はマーケット、bookstore-library、飲食店、イベント会場。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman at a Mercado San Telmo-style indoor market, smiling toward someone near camera while holding fruit and a malbec-plum vintage scarf, wearing an ivory ribbed short-sleeve top, dark mini skort over safety shorts, cropped olive utility jacket tied at the waist, bare legs, plum Mary Jane flats worn without socks, and a canvas crossbody
images.title: 01 Market San Telmo scarf
images.tags: Manga Ink Anime / Buenos Aires / market / 18-19-adult

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman browsing in an El Ateneo Grand Splendid-style former-theater bookstore balcony, reading a book while holding a coat and cream tote, wearing glasses, a black fine-knit sleeveless shell, cropped malbec leather vest, high-waisted charcoal culotte trousers, thin dark stockings, and low burgundy slingback pumps
images.title: 02 Bookstore Ateneo balcony
images.tags: Soft Real Art / Buenos Aires / bookstore / 25-29
images.locationDetail: El Ateneo Grand Splendid-style former-theater bookstore balcony

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman in a San Telmo historic-bar interior, leaning into conversation with an off-frame friend at a wooden table, wearing a black off-shoulder top, chunky cream cardigan slipped down naturally indoors, malbec satin mini skirt over fitted shorts, matte opaque ribbed over-knee socks in deep charcoal plum-black, low black block-heel pumps, and a malbec hair ribbon
images.title: 03 Bar San Telmo conversation

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman arriving at a Teatro General San Martín-style contemporary theater entrance in Buenos Aires, smiling toward an off-frame companion while adjusting a camel coat belt over a black asymmetric midi dress, opaque malbec tights, burgundy pointed pumps, malbec enamel earrings, and a compact black clutch
images.title: 04 Theater San Martín coat
